message:
feat(fcp-core): add PartialOrd/Ord to ObjectId and optimize LwwMap merge

ObjectId ordering:
- Derive PartialOrd and Ord for ObjectId to enable use in BTreeMap,
  BTreeSet, and sorted collections. This is essential for deterministic
  iteration order in consensus-critical code paths and for efficient
  range queries in object stores.

LwwMap CRDT improvements:
- Add PartialEq bound to LwwMap value type V. This enables comparison
  of CRDT entries during merge operations without requiring full
  cloning for equality checks.
- Optimize merge() to skip redundant clone operations when entries
  are identical (existing.wins_over(entry) || existing == entry).
  This reduces memory allocations in common cases where merging
  replicas that have already converged.

These changes improve both the ergonomics and performance of the
FCP core data structures for mesh coordination scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
